title: Module 1.4: The Laser Safety Officer Role
subtitle: Responsibilities, Authority, and Daily Operations
description: Understand the critical role of the Laser Safety Officer (LSO) including responsibilities per ANSI Z136.1, authority levels, competency requirements, and daily operational duties. Features interactive responsibility matrix and scenario-based learning.
learning_objectives: Describe the LSO's authority and responsibilities per ANSI Z136.1
Differentiate between LSO (executive) and LSA (advisory) roles
Identify required competencies and qualifications for LSOs
Execute daily LSO operational duties and checks
Respond appropriately to laser incidents and emergencies

badge.name: LSO Foundation
badge.description: Understanding of LSO roles and responsibilities
